articles.title: Dual-token authentication for Nakama game servers with Amazon Cognito on AWS
articles.excerpt: In this post, you learn how to configure an Amazon Cognito User Pool for SRP-based game client authentication with no client secret. You will implement a Go runtime hook that validates Cognito JWTs and bridges player identity to Nakama sessions.

Instrumenting AI Agents for the Agent Timeline: A Practical OpenTelemetry Guide
articles.excerpt: The LLM is rarely the root cause of agent failures. This technical guide shows how to instrument AI agents using OpenTelemetry's GenAI semantic conventions so they appear in Honeycomb's Agent Timeline—including tool calls, multi-agent handoffs, and framework-specific SDKs—so you can debug what actually went wrong.
